purpose: Rank the next optimization targets from measured hot-path profiles, host raw baselines, and missing profile slots.

profile_record_contract.description: Every row is either measured profile evidence or a missing profile slot ranked for capture.
profile_record_contract.stale_rejection: input_digests and normalized artifact comparison must match current source artifacts
profile_record_contract.ranking: descending hotness_score, then family, symbol, mode, profile_id
profile_record_contract.parity_policy: No optimization target is accepted without at least one fixture or proof reference.

tail_attribution_contract.description: Measured rows must bind p50/p95/p99 to an API family, runtime mode, validation profile, proof command, and source artifact path.
tail_attribution_contract.measured_policy: coverage_state=measured rows require numeric p50_ns, p95_ns, p99_ns and a non-empty proof_command.
tail_attribution_contract.missing_policy: missing_profile rows keep null percentiles but still identify the artifact that owns the missing slot.

host_comparison_limits.limit: TSM validation stages have no host-glibc analogue; host comparison starts at symbol-level raw rows.
Raw host baselines are unavailable until the symbol or benchmark slot is captured.

optimization_beads_to_create.title: Reduce full membrane validate_* entrypoint p50 before expanding hardened defaults
Capture and optimize missing strict/hardened string and malloc profile slots
Split pthread thread churn from condvar/mutex fast paths under raw host comparison
Add syscall benchmark suite before syscall hot-path optimization

host_baseline.limit: membrane validation stages have no host-glibc equivalent

tail_attribution.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 FRANKENLIBC_MODE=strict FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_frankenlibc_bd_bp8fl_8_2_stage_strict RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=FRANKENLIBC_MODE,FRANKENLIBC_BENCH_PIN,CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- cargo bench -p frankenlibc-bench --bench membrane_bench -- --noplot
